/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ravex-loader.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/ravex-loader.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ravex-loader.dir/window.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ravex-loader.dir/checks.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ravex-loader.dir/optimize.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ravex-loader.dir/github_checker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ravex-loader.dir/process.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ravex-loader.dir/config.cpp.o" -o ravex-loader  /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so -lpthread
